title: Image To Image Travel Photo Chibi Sticker Edit
sourceTitle: Image To Image Travel Photo Chibi Sticker Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image cute chibi sticker overlay edit for an uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, preserving the original travel photo exactly. Subject: The people, clothes, pose, expression, background street scene, light, and composition in fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt remain unchanged; only chibi stickers inspired by the photographed person are added around the edges. Scene: Original travel photo stays as the base image, with phone-sticker-style chibi characters, white sticker outlines, small hearts, stars, arrows, and handwritten captions added lightly near the photo border. Composition: Preserve the subject and landmark area; place stickers only around edges or open spaces, never covering the main person or key scenery; keep a casual social-sharing layout rather than an advertisement. Signature Elements: Uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, peace sign, holding a drink, walking, selfie, waving, 随手一拍, 今天也可爱, 记录一下, 开心出门, specific sharing mood variant with readable visual details, white-outlined chibi stickers, small hearts, stars, arrows, and preserved travel-photo base. Fixed source details: Source Travel Photo: city street travel photo with one adult traveler. Style: Cute lightweight Moments-style photo decoration with adorable chibi mini-people referencing the original hairstyle, clothes, accessories, and overall feeling, plus soft doodle accents and relaxed life-recording charm. Color Palette: Original photo colors remain unchanged; stickers use white outlines, soft pastel fills, tiny warm accents, and readable handwritten Chinese notes. Lighting: Original photo lighting is preserved; sticker overlays are flat, clean, and lightly shadowed like phone stickers without relighting the photo. Typography: 随手一拍, 今天也可爱, 记录一下, 开心出门 appear as short handwritten Chinese sticker captions, casual and natural, never commercial or poster-like. Restrictions: keep stickers cute and light; and preserve the uploaded travel photo as the base image.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
